query:
UPDATE users 
SET 
  userTier = CASE 
    WHEN id <= 10 THEN 'founder_core'
    WHEN id <= 20 THEN 'beta_tester'
    ELSE 'regular'
  END,
  seatNumber = id,
  lifetimeFree = CASE WHEN id <= 10 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END,
  founderBadge = CASE 
    WHEN id <= 10 THEN CONCAT('Founder #', id)
    WHEN id <= 20 THEN CONCAT('Beta Tester #', id)
    ELSE NULL
  END,
  subscriptionTier = CASE 
    WHEN id <= 10 THEN 'founder'
    WHEN id <= 20 THEN 'beta'
    ELSE subscriptionTier
  END
WHERE id <= 20;
